subjects.description: Large adult gorilla walking through deep snow in a quiet winter forest.
subjects.appearance_details: Dense black fur with frosted tips, powerful shoulders, long arms, broad chest, visible breath in the cold air, snow clinging lightly to hands and feet.
subjects.relationship: Sole main animal subject, framed as a majestic presence within the isolated landscape.
subjects.location: Foreground center, moving along an untouched snowy path between tall snow loaded trees.
subjects.relative_size: Large and dominant in the frame, occupying much of the lower center while trees tower behind it.
subjects.orientation: Facing forward with a slight angle toward camera right, moving deeper across the frame.
subjects.pose: Steady knuckle walking posture with head lifted and shoulders rolling naturally.
subjects.action: Walks deliberately through fluffy snow, leaving heavy tracks with each step.
subjects.state_changes: Starts entering the snowy clearing, progresses with visible footprint trails, ends closer to the camera with drifting powder around its limbs.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Dark skin mostly hidden beneath thick coarse black fur, rough texture visible around face and hands.
subjects.facial_features: Heavy brow ridge, broad flat nose, strong jaw, deep set dark eyes.

background_setting: Pristine winter forest blanketed in deep soft snow, with towering evergreens and bare branches weighed down by fresh powder. The setting feels remote, silent, and untouched.

lighting.conditions: Low golden sun near the horizon, soft warm highlights on snow, cool blue shadows under trees, gentle haze in the cold air.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Low golden sun near the horizon, soft warm highlights on snow, cool blue shadows under trees, gentle haze in the cold air.

aesthetics.composition: Serene, majestic, natural, high detail snow texture, realistic fur movement, tranquil isolation.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Serene, majestic, natural, high detail snow texture, realistic fur movement, tranquil isolation.

cinematography.camera_motion: Low eye level tracking shot with a slow forward glide, shallow foreground snow detail, mild parallax from trees, stable cinematic wildlife framing.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: Realistic text to video wildlife scene with natural motion and physical snow interaction.
artistic_style: Cinematic realism, warm winter golden hour color grade, detailed environmental atmosphere.
context: A powerful gorilla crosses an isolated snowy forest as winter light turns the landscape calm and luminous.

actions.description: The gorilla steps into view from the snowy trees, compressing fresh powder beneath its hands and feet.
It continues forward at a deliberate pace, shoulders rolling, breath faintly visible, snow dust lifting from each planted step.
The gorilla slows and raises its head slightly as golden light catches its fur and the quiet forest surrounds it.

segments.key_changes: Wide winter forest opens with the gorilla emerging through deep snow.
segments.camera: Low eye level tracking shot with a slow forward glide, shallow foreground snow detail, mild parallax from trees, stable cinematic wildlife framing.

segments.description: Closer view of fur, footprints, snow laden branches, and warm light across the terrain.
segments.key_changes: Closer view of fur, footprints, snow laden branches, and warm light across the terrain.
segments.camera: Low eye level tracking shot with a slow forward glide, shallow foreground snow detail, mild parallax from trees, stable cinematic wildlife framing.

temporal_caption: 0:00-0:02 a gorilla enters a deep snowy forest path. 0:02-0:05 it walks steadily through powder under golden winter light. 0:05-0:07 it slows, alert and majestic, amid the silent trees.
audio_description: Soft crunching snow, faint winter wind through branches, distant muted forest ambience, low heavy breathing from the gorilla.
